# Copilot Instructions

## Repo Map

- `.env.example` - example env file for required variables.
- `ahk/` - AutoHotkey scripts for in-game macros.
- `monke/` - Violentmonkey userscripts for web-based automation; see `.github/instructions/monke.instructions.md`.
- `py/` - Python helper scripts and tests.
- `launch.cmd` - main Windows launcher script.

## Important

When updating `.env`, always update `.env.example` with a corresponding placeholder or generic value to keep the template in sync.
